settings.heading:
Not just what's in it.
What's been done to it.
settings.subheading: The same ingredients that are in hundreds of other supplements. Processed through a technology developed over 30 years of advanced physics research. The difference is measurable. We have the studies to prove it.

settings.quote_text: Why do two supplements with identical ingredients produce different results? Standard supplements deliver ingredients passively — the body absorbs what it can, and the rest is lost. Bioavailability, the percentage of an ingredient that actually reaches your cells, is rarely better than 30–40% for most oral supplements. Igniton's enhancement process changes the molecular state of each ingredient before it ever enters the body — making it more compatible with cellular uptake mechanisms and reducing the effective dose required to produce the same biological outcome. This isn't a claim. It's been measured in two randomized, placebo-controlled university trials, published in peer-reviewed journals, comparing the enhanced formula against the same unenhanced ingredients side by side.

settings.section_heading: Three measurable differences between standard and enhanced.

settings.label: Cellular bioavailability — lower effective dose required vs. standard form. The cold plasma process puts ingredients into an "excited" molecular state for greater cellular uptake.
Bioenergetic coherence — higher bioenergetic light emission measured on igniton-charged ingredients, indicating greater molecular order.
Clinical outcomes — short-term memory improvement vs. placebo in the 90-day university trial.

settings.section_title: Four steps from raw ingredient to enhanced formula.

settings.step_description: GRAS-certified, ODI-grade active compounds only. Citicoline, Alpha-GPC, NMN, Resveratrol, CoQ10, NADH, and more. Zero fillers, binders, or excipients — every capsule is pure active ingredient. Same compounds found in leading clinical studies and university research.

Ingredients enter a precisely controlled high-vacuum environment. Pressure control and contamination isolation protect molecular integrity before the enhancement process begins. Equipment developed from technology originally used at CERN's physics laboratories in Switzerland.

Igniton quasi-particles are embedded into the supplement molecules using a coherent photonic stream through Si-wafer quantum well nano-layers. This creates a fundamentally different molecular state. Hot plasma replaced by cold plasma — enabling compact, precise, energy-efficient production.

Every production batch is tied to the same enhancement protocol used in the clinical trials. The enhanced formula is tested against placebo and the identical non-enhanced formula. Published in peer-reviewed journals — compared head-to-head against unenhanced controls.

settings.section_heading: From particle physics to your daily supplement.

settings.step_description: Advanced physics research on eNPQ quasi-particles — now called ignitons — begins. Technology developed using hot plasma systems in private lab facilities.
A dedicated lab is set up in Switzerland, with key hardware for verifying and measuring igniton quasi-particles sourced from CERN. Research into industrial applications begins.
Swiss lab operations conclude after sufficient data is collected. A new, compact cold plasma system — more energy-efficient and precise — is designed, built, and established in Louisville, Colorado.
Two university-led, peer-reviewed trials published. Enhanced formula consistently outperforms identical unenhanced formula across cognitive and stress biomarker outcomes.

settings.section_heading: Your body is 70% water. Molecular coherence is the mechanism.
settings.measurement_caption: GDV energy measurement on water molecules. Inner noise drops from 3,033 (standard) to 1 (enhanced) — an indicator of near-perfect molecular symmetry.

settings.title: Higher energy state

settings.title: Lower molecular noise
settings.description: Inner noise drops from 3,033 to 1 — an indicator of near-perfect molecular symmetry and reduced energy loss in cellular interactions.
